languages.text: {n}Бригадир хмурится, прикидывая что-то в уме, потом чешет в затылке, взъерошивая пятерней сивые волосы. {/n} "Сколько себя помню. Все мы тут, можно сказать, потомственные. Работать начинаем с того же возраста, что ходить и говорить". {n}Он бросает быстрый взгляд на техножреца.{/n} "Работать под началом {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g} — большая честь. Грех жаловаться".

traits.locale_text: {n}Бригадир хмурится, прикидывая что-то в уме, потом чешет в затылке, взъерошивая пятерней сивые волосы. {/n} "Сколько себя помню. Все мы тут, можно сказать, потомственные. Работать начинаем с того же возраста, что ходить и говорить". {n}Он бросает быстрый взгляд на техножреца.{/n} "Работать под началом {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g} — большая честь. Грех жаловаться".

languages.text: {n}The foreman frowns, calculating something in his mind, then scratches the nape of his neck, tousling his grey hair. {/n} "For as long as I can remember. All of us here, you might say, are hereditary labourers. Been working since we could walk and talk." {n}He casts a quick glance at the Tech-Priest.{/n} "It's a great honour to work under the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I'd be a wicked man to complain."

Работать начинаем с того же возраста, что ходить и говорить". {n}Он бросает быстрый взгляд на техножреца.{/n} "Работать под началом {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Адептус Механикус{/g} — большая честь. Грех жаловаться".

I'd be a wicked man to complain."

{n}The foreman frowns, calculating something in his mind, then scratches the nape of his neck, tousling his grey hair. {/n} "For as long as I can remember. All of us here, you might say, are hereditary labourers. Been working since we could walk and talk." {n}He casts a quick glance at the Tech-Priest.{/n} "It's a great honour to work under the Adeptus Mechanicus. I'd be a wicked man to complain."

languages.text: {n}大工長は眉をひそめ、何かを計算している。そして首筋を掻き、灰色の髪を乱す。{/n}「記憶に覚えている限り、ずっとそうだった。ここにいる我々全員は、生まれながらにして労働者だ。歩くことも話すこともできるようになったら、働き始めた。」{n}彼はテクプリストに一瞬の視線を向ける。{/n}「機械神官団の下で働くことは、大きな栄誉だ。愚かな男だと言われかねない。」
languages.original_text: {n}The foreman frowns, calculating something in his mind, then scratches the nape of his neck, tousling his grey hair. {/n} "For as long as I can remember. All of us here, you might say, are hereditary labourers. Been working since we could walk and talk." {n}He casts a quick glance at the Tech-Priest.{/n} "It's a great honour to work under the Adeptus Mechanicus. I'd be a wicked man to complain."

traits.locale_text: foremanは眉をひそめ、何かを計算している。そして首筋を掻き、灰色の髪を乱す。{n}「記憶に覚えている限り、ずっとそうだった。ここにいる我々全員は、生まれながらにして労働者だ。歩くことも話すこともできるようになったら、働き始めた。」{n}彼はテクプリストに一瞬の視線を向ける。{n}「機械神官団の下で働くことは、大きな栄誉だ。愚かな男だと言われかねない。」

languages.text: {n}Kaşlarını çatan ustabaşı; akıldan bir şeyler hesaplıyor, sonra da gri saçlarını dağıtarak ensesini kaşıyor.{/n} "Kendimi bildim bileli. Buradaki herkes, deyim yerindeyse nesilden nesle işçidir. Yürümeyi ve konuşmayı öğrendiğimizden beri çalışıyoruz." {n}Tekno Rahip'e hızlı bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus'un{/g} emrinde çalışmak büyük bir onur. Şikâyet edersem nankörlük etmiş olurum."
languages.original_text: {n}The foreman frowns, calculating something in his mind, then scratches the nape of his neck, tousling his grey hair. {/n} "For as long as I can remember. All of us here, you might say, are hereditary labourers. Been working since we could walk and talk." {n}He casts a quick glance at the Tech-Priest.{/n} "It's a great honour to work under the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I'd be a wicked man to complain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kaşlarını çatan ustabaşı; akıldan bir şeyler hesaplıyor, sonra da gri saçlarını dağıtarak ensesini kaşıyor.{/n} "Kendimi bildim bileli. Buradaki herkes, deyim yerindeyse nesilden nesle işçidir. Yürümeyi ve konuşmayı öğrendiğimizden beri çalışıyoruz." {n}Tekno Rahip'e hızlı bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus'un{/g} emrinde çalışmak büyük bir onur. Şikâyet edersem nankörlük etmiş olurum."

languages.text: {n}El capataz frunce el ceño, sopesando algo en su mente, y luego se rasca la nuca hasta desaliñar sus cabellos canos. {/n} «Desde que tengo uso de razón. Todos los que estamos aquí tenemos cargos hereditarios, por así decirlo. Llevo en esta plataforma desde que aprendí a caminar y a hablar». {n}Echa una mirada furtiva al tecnosacerdote.{/n} «Es un gran honor trabajar al servicio del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Quejarme de algo sería una blasfemia».
languages.original_text: {n}The foreman frowns, calculating something in his mind, then scratches the nape of his neck, tousling his grey hair. {/n} "For as long as I can remember. All of us here, you might say, are hereditary labourers. Been working since we could walk and talk." {n}He casts a quick glance at the Tech-Priest.{/n} "It's a great honour to work under the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I'd be a wicked man to complain."

traits.locale_text: {n}El capataz frunce el ceño, sopesando algo en su mente, y luego se rasca la nuca hasta desaliñar sus cabellos canos. {/n} «Desde que tengo uso de razón. Todos los que estamos aquí tenemos cargos hereditarios, por así decirlo. Llevo en esta plataforma desde que aprendí a caminar y a hablar». {n}Echa una mirada furtiva al tecnosacerdote.{/n} «Es un gran honor trabajar al servicio del {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Quejarme de algo sería una blasfemia».

languages.text: {n}工头眉头紧锁，心中盘算着什么，随后挠了挠后颈，灰白头发被揉得散乱。{/n}“打我记事起就在这儿了。可以说，我们都是世袭劳工，刚学会走路说话就要开始埋头苦干。”{n}他飞快地瞥了一眼技术神甫。{/n}“能为{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}机械修会{/g}效力是莫大的荣光，抱怨的人可太不知好歹了。”
languages.original_text: {n}The foreman frowns, calculating something in his mind, then scratches the nape of his neck, tousling his grey hair. {/n} "For as long as I can remember. All of us here, you might say, are hereditary labourers. Been working since we could walk and talk." {n}He casts a quick glance at the Tech-Priest.{/n} "It's a great honour to work under the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I'd be a wicked man to complain."

traits.locale_text: {n}工头眉头紧锁，心中盘算着什么，随后挠了挠后颈，灰白头发被揉得散乱。{/n}“打我记事起就在这儿了。可以说，我们都是世袭劳工，刚学会走路说话就要开始埋头苦干。”{n}他飞快地瞥了一眼技术神甫。{/n}“能为{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}机械修会{/g}效力是莫大的荣光，抱怨的人可太不知好歹了。”

languages.text: {n}Le contremaître fronce les sourcils, calculant quelque chose dans sa tête, puis il se gratte la nuque, ébouriffant au passage ses cheveux grisonnants. {/n}« D'aussi loin que je me souvienne, j'ai toujours été à son service. Les hommes stationnés ici sont ouvriers de père en fils. On nous met au travail dès qu'on est capables de marcher et de parler. » {n}Il lance un rapide coup d'œil au technoprêtre.{/n} « C'est un grand honneur d'exercer nos fonctions sous la supervision de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Il serait malvenu de ma part de me plaindre de mon sort. »
languages.original_text: {n}The foreman frowns, calculating something in his mind, then scratches the nape of his neck, tousling his grey hair. {/n} "For as long as I can remember. All of us here, you might say, are hereditary labourers. Been working since we could walk and talk." {n}He casts a quick glance at the Tech-Priest.{/n} "It's a great honour to work under the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I'd be a wicked man to complain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le contremaître fronce les sourcils, calculant quelque chose dans sa tête, puis il se gratte la nuque, ébouriffant au passage ses cheveux grisonnants. {/n}« D'aussi loin que je me souvienne, j'ai toujours été à son service. Les hommes stationnés ici sont ouvriers de père en fils. On nous met au travail dès qu'on est capables de marcher et de parler. » {n}Il lance un rapide coup d'œil au technoprêtre.{/n} « C'est un grand honneur d'exercer nos fonctions sous la supervision de l'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. Il serait malvenu de ma part de me plaindre de mon sort. »

languages.text: {n}Der Vorarbeiter runzelt die Stirn, überlegt kurz und greift sich in die zerzausten grauen Haare an seinem Nacken. {/n} "Seit ich denken kann. Man könnte sagen, wir sind hier alle Erbarbeiter. Wir arbeiten, sobald wir laufen und sprechen können." {n}Er wirft einen kurzen Blick auf den Techpriester.{/n} "Es ist eine große Ehre, für das {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g} zu arbeiten. Es wäre dumm, sich zu beschweren."
languages.original_text: {n}The foreman frowns, calculating something in his mind, then scratches the nape of his neck, tousling his grey hair. {/n} "For as long as I can remember. All of us here, you might say, are hereditary labourers. Been working since we could walk and talk." {n}He casts a quick glance at the Tech-Priest.{/n} "It's a great honour to work under the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusMechanicusGlossary}Adeptus Mechanicus{/g}. I'd be a wicked man to complain."
